title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 362.355 - Administrators of deceased officers liable
text:
362.355.  Administrators of deceased officers liable. — This chapter shall extend to and may be enforced by and against the executors and administrators of such deceased officers, agents and managers.
(RSMo 1939 § 7978) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 5383; 1919 § 11765; 1909 § 1115
